chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.No.D-725 of 2025 Date Order with signature of the Judge 1. For orders on office objections 2. For hearing of CMA 3882/2025. 3. For hearing of main case 27.02.2025. Malik Altaf Hussain, advocate for petitioners Mr. Muhammad Akram Tarique, advocate for respondent No.2. Mr. Muhammad Qasim, DAG. = Learned counsel for respondent No.2 has filed a statement alongwith a notification and submits that the subject property was declared as Evacuee Trust Property in 1963. On the other hand, claim of the petitioners is based on sub leases duly registered. Be that as it may, till objections are filed by respondents including Evacuee Trust Property Board and appreciated, no coercive action shall be taken against petitioners and subject property be de-sealed. Adjourned to a date to be fixed by the office in four weeks. Respondents shall file comments for a decision of this petition on merits. JUDGE JUDGE A.K
